title: North Park Vegan Food Popup
description: <p>2nd Saturdays 12 pm – 4 pm North Park Mini Park 3812 29th St, San Diego San Diego’s biggest outdoor vegan market, featuring over 60 vendors. The North Park Vegan Food Popup is located at the North Park Mini Park, a vibrant outdoor plaza featuring several seating areas, gardens and a play area for kids. […]</p>\n
